item.title: CoffeeTok is Getting Ridiculous
item.description: CoffeeTok is basically just wasteful, excessively sugary, and absurdly large drinks, often referred to as "flavor goo" or "diabetes in a cup".

media:content.media:title: CoffeeTok is Getting Ridiculous
media:content.media:description: CoffeeTok is basically just wasteful, excessively sugary, and absurdly large drinks, often referred to as "flavor goo" or "diabetes in a cup".

item.title: What Even Was Shallow Hal?
item.description: It feels like at some point in their career, every big actor puts on the fat suit...

media:content.media:title: What Even Was Shallow Hal?
media:content.media:description: It feels like at some point in their career, every big actor puts on the fat suit...

item.title: I Found The Baddest Dude On Social Media!
item.description: Have you heard of Joey Breaux before? Do you think he's as awesome as I think he is?

media:content.media:title: I Found The Baddest Dude On Social Media!
media:content.media:description: Have you heard of Joey Breaux before? Do you think he's as awesome as I think he is?
